hero.headline:
Family-Owned Pool Care You Can
Count On
hero.subheadline: For over 30 years, the Houseman family has kept Sacramento pools sparkling clean. From weekly maintenance to complete remodels, our certified technicians handle it all so you can focus on what matters most — enjoying your backyard.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Care<br class="hidden md:block"> From One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to new pool construction, the Houseman family has you covered. One call handles everything your pool or spa needs.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Customizable maintenance plans including chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks. Your pool stays swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and more — our factory trained technicians diagnose and fix it right. Residential and commercial repairs done with care.

cards.title: Leak Detection
cards.description: Professional leak detection for pool plumbing, shells, and equipment. We find and fix leaks before they cause costly damage to your property.

cards.title: Pool Remodel & Resurfacing
cards.description: Transform your existing pool with new plaster, tile, coping, and decorative upgrades. We bring tired pools back to life beautifully.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Energy-efficient variable speed pumps, solar heating, LED lighting, and safety covers. Modern equipment that saves you money every month.

cards.title: New Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom-designed pools with waterfalls, LED lighting, and features tailored to your backyard vision. From concept to first splash, we build it all.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Pool

steps.title: Call the Houseman Family
steps.description: Tell us about your pool or spa. We'll schedule a free inspection and provide an honest, no-pressure estimate. We return calls same-day or next-day.

steps.title: We Send Certified Technicians
steps.description: Our chemically certified and factory trained techs arrive on schedule. Cleaning, chemical balancing, repairs, or remodels — we handle it all professionally.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Leisure Time
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and worry-free. That's our promise — we work for your leisure so you can relax and enjoy your backyard oasis.

about.label: Why Sacramento Trusts Us
about.headline: A Father-Son Team Dedicated to Your Pool
about.description: Founded in 1995 by Jerry and Scott Houseman, Leisure Time Pool Service is a true family business built on trust and expertise. For over 30 years, we've served Sacramento and surrounding areas with the kind of care that only comes from treating every customer's pool like our own. Our technicians are chemically certified and factory trained — because your family deserves nothing less.

features.title: Certified & Factory Trained
features.description: Every technician is chemically certified and factory trained on all major pool equipment brands.

features.title: Customizable Service Plans
features.description: No cookie-cutter packages. We tailor weekly maintenance plans to fit your pool's unique needs and your budget.

features.title: Full-Service Company
features.description: From weekly cleaning to new construction and everything in between — one trusted team handles it all.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Customizable plans with no long-term contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our "Houseman Family" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're ever not satisfied with our work, call us and we'll come back to make it right — no questions asked. We've built our reputation over 31 years by standing behind every job, big or small. Your pool is our priority, and we don't rest until it meets our family's standards.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start pool service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within a few days. We pride ourselves on same-day or next-day callbacks, so you'll hear from us fast. Just give us a call at 916-638-4100 and we'll get you on the schedule.

faqs.question: What areas in Sacramento do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Sacramento and surrounding communities including Rancho Cordova, Citrus Heights, Carmichael, Gold River, Elk Grove, Folsom, Elkhorn, and the Pocket-Greenhaven area. If you're nearby, give us a call — we likely cover your neighborhood.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All of our pool technicians are chemically certified and factory trained on major equipment brands. We also hold CSLB License #880260 C53, so you can trust that your pool is in qualified hands.

faqs.question: Do you work on spas and hot tubs too?
faqs.answer: Yes! We specialize in both portable and in-ground spa repair, covering heating systems, jets, pumps, and electrical components. Whether it's a quick fix or a major repair, we've got the expertise.

faqs.question: Can you help with pool remodels and new construction?
faqs.answer: We sure can. From plaster resurfacing and tile replacement to complete new pool construction with waterfalls and LED lighting, we handle the full scope. We've been building and remodeling pools in Sacramento for over 30 years.

testimonials.name: John "JB" Brown
testimonials.text: The pool looks fantastic and the repair work to the pump looks brand new — excellent work. Leisure Time consistently delivers quality results.

testimonials.name: Carol C.
testimonials.text: Just had a leak repaired in pool equipment. They responded to my call so quickly and Austin was great! Thank you Leisure Time Pool Service for the fast, professional work.

testimonials.name: Dr. Parnell L.
testimonials.text: I have been very happy with the service for years. My technician Jarred is professional, courteous, thorough and communicates well about pool observations. Highly recommended.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool You
Never Worry About?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure estimate from the Houseman family. Over 30 years of Sacramento pool expertise — just one call away.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every estimate
